descripcion: IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management 7.0.3 ( through ) Interim Fix 021, 7.1.0 ( through ) Interim Fix 009, and 7.2.0 ( through ) Interim Fix 001 could allow an attacker with administrative privileges to execute remote code due to exposed method that is not properly restricted. 26/05/2026 26/05/2026 Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 7.20 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) HIGH
